system_prompt: You are an OpenFOAM debugging planner. Given current foam files, error logs and reviewer analysis, create a minimal rewrite plan. Output MUST be strict JSON only, with this exact schema: {"target_files": [{"file": "relative/path", "changes": "change1; change2"}]}. Rules: 1) Do not use markdown, backticks, or comments. 2) Use double quotes for all strings. 3) In changes, use short plain text actions separated by semicolons. 4) Do not include parentheses, backticks, or quote characters inside changes text. 5) Do not include run steps; only file edits.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    (0    0    0)
    (0.02 0    0)
    (0.02 0.02 0)
    (0    0.02 0)
    (0    0    0.001)
    (0.02 0    0.001)
    (0.02 0.02 0.001)
    (0    0.02 0.001)
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (40 40 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    fuel
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 5 4)
        );
    }
    air
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (3 7 6 2)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 4 7 3)
            (1 2 6 5)
        );
    }
    frontAndBack
    {
        type empty;
        faces
        (
            (0 3 2 1)
            (4 5 6 7)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     reactingFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.5;

deltaT          1e-06;

writeControl    adjustableRunTime;

writeInterval   0.05;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  8;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;

adjustTimeStep  yes;

maxCo           0.4;

maxDeltaT       1e-04;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;

    div(phi,U)      Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,K)      Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,h)      Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,k)      Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,Yi_h)   Gauss upwind;
    div(((rho*nuEff)*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    "rho.*"
    {
        solver          diagonal;
    }

    p
    {
        solver          PBiCGStab;
        preconditioner  DILU;
        tolerance       1e-6;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|h|k|epsilon)"
    {
        solver          PBiCGStab;
        preconditioner  DILU;
        tolerance       1e-6;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    "(U|h|k|epsilon)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(Yi)"
    {
        solver          PBiCGStab;
        preconditioner  DILU;
        tolerance       1e-6;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    "(Yi)Final"
    {
        $Yi;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    momentumPredictor   yes;
    nOuterCorrectors    1;
    nCorrectors         2;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;

    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

relaxationFactors
{
    equations
    {
        ".*"            1;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='chemistryProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      chemistryProperties;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

chemistryType
{
    solver          ode;
    method          standard;
}

chemistry       on;

initialChemicalTimeStep 1e-07;

odeCoeffs
{
    solver          seulex;
    absTol          1e-12;
    relTol          1e-01;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='reactions', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      reactions;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

species
(
    CH4
    O2
    N2
    H2O
    CO2
);

reactions
{
    methaneReaction
    {
        type        irreversibleArrheniusReaction;
        reaction    "CH4 + 2O2 = CO2 + 2H2O";
        A           5.012e11;
        beta        0;
        Ta          24358;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='thermo.compressibleGas', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      thermoPhysicalProperties;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

thermoType
{
    type            hePsiThermo;
    mixture         reactingMixture;
    transport       sutherland;
    thermo          janaf;
    energy          sensibleEnthalpy;
    equationOfState perfectGas;
    specie          specie;
}

inertSpecie N2;

chemistryReader foamChemistryReader;

foamChemistryFile "<constant>/reactions";

foamChemistryThermoFile "<constant>/thermo.compressibleGas";

// Species thermodynamic data (NASA 7-coefficient polynomials with Sutherland transport)

species
(
    CH4
    O2
    N2
    H2O
    CO2
);

CH4
{
    specie
    {
        molWeight       16.0428;
    }
    thermodynamics
    {
        Tlow            200;
        Thigh           6000;
        Tcommon         1000;
        highCpCoeffs    ( 1.63543 0.0100844 -3.36924e-06 5.34973e-10 -3.15528e-14 -10005.6 9.9937 );
        lowCpCoeffs     ( 5.14988 -0.013671 4.91801e-05 -4.84744e-08 1.66694e-11 -10246.6 -4.64132 );
    }
    transport
    {
        As              1.0112e-06;
        Ts              164;
    }
}

    }
    thermodynamics

        Thigh           6000;
        Tcommon         1000;

        lowCpCoeffs     ( 3.78246 -0.00299673 9.8473e-06 -9.6813e-09 3.24373e-12 -1063.94 3.65768 );
    }
    transport

    }
}

        lowCpCoeffs     ( 3.29868 0.00140824 -3.96322e-06 5.64152e-09 -2.44486e-12 -1020.9 3.95037 );
    }
    transport
    {
        As              1.67212e-06;
        Ts              170.672;
    }
}

H2O
{
    specie
    {
        molWeight       18.0153;
    }
    thermodynamics
    {
        Tlow            200;
        Thigh           6000;

        lowCpCoeffs     ( 4.19864 -0.00203643 6.5204e-06 -5.48797e-09 1.77198e-12 -30293.7 -0.849032 );
    }

}

CO2

    }

        Tlow            200;
        Thigh           6000;
        Tcommon         1000;
        highCpCoeffs    ( 4.63660 0.00274146 -9.95898e-07 1.60387e-10 -9.16199e-15 -49024.9 -1.93535 );

<review_analysis>## Error Diagnosis

The error message is:

```
keyword thermoType is undefined in dictionary "constant/physicalProperties"
```

This means OpenFOAM 10 expects a `thermoType` entry to be present in the `physicalProperties` file. Looking at the history, the previous attempt correctly identified that `reactingMixture` was deprecated in favor of `multiComponentMixture` in OpenFOAM 10, and suggested moving the thermo-related content to a new `thermophysicalProperties` file.

However, the issue now is that **both** `physicalProperties` and `thermophysicalProperties` exist, and the solver is specifically looking for `thermoType` in `physicalProperties` (not finding it). Meanwhile, `thermophysicalProperties` contains the correct `thermoType` with `multiComponentMixture`.

## Root Cause Analysis

In OpenFOAM 10 with `hePsiThermo`, the solver looks for the thermophysical properties configuration in `constant/physicalProperties`. The file needs to contain the `thermoType` entry (and consequently the `mixture` entry) directly. Having split the thermo configuration across two separate files (`physicalProperties` and `thermophysicalProperties`) causes this lookup failure.

The `thermophysicalProperties` file already exists with the correct content, but the solver isn't reading it because it's hardcoded to look in `physicalProperties`.

## Proposed Solution

**Move the thermo-type configuration from `thermophysicalProperties` back into `physicalProperties`.**

Specifically, in `constant/physicalProperties`, add the following entries at the top level (outside any sub-dictionaries):

```
thermoType
{
    type            hePsiThermo;
    mixture         multiComponentMixture;
    transport       sutherland;
    thermo          janaf;
    energy          sensibleEnthalpy;
    equationOfState perfectGas;
    specie          specie;
}

inertSpecie N2;

chemistryReader foamChemistryReader;

foamChemistryFile "<constant>/reactions";

foamChemistryThermoFile "<constant>/thermo.compressibleGas";
```

Keep all the species thermodynamic data blocks (CH4, O2, N2, H2O, CO2) and their transport coefficients inside `physicalProperties` as well — essentially copy the entire content of `thermophysicalProperties` into `physicalProperties`, keeping the structure intact.

Then, **remove or simplify** the `thermophysicalProperties` file. Since OpenFOAM 10's `hePsiThermo` reads everything from `physicalProperties`, the separate `thermophysicalProperties` file is no longer needed. If it remains, it won't cause harm but it's unnecessary.

Alternatively, if you prefer to keep them separate, you could add a `#include "thermophysicalProperties"` directive inside `physicalProperties` at the top level, but the simpler approach is just merging the content directly into `physicalProperties`.

## Summary

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `constant/physicalProperties` | Add the full `thermoType` dictionary, `inertSpecie`, `chemistryReader`, `foamChemistryFile`, `foamChemistryThermoFile`, and all species thermodynamic data blocks. Remove anything unrelated (like `multiComponentMixtureCoeffs` if present). |
| `constant/thermophysicalProperties` | Can be removed entirely since the solver reads from `physicalProperties` directly. |</review_analysis>

Include chemical kinetics using the reaction mechanism. velocity of fuel is 0.2 m/s and velocity of air is -0.1 m/s. Set the simulation runtime from 0 to 0.5 seconds with a write interval of 0.05 seconds and deltaT of 1e-6.</user_requirement>
